name: session-retro
description: Analyze a Claude Code or Codex session (or a multi-session arc) from local JSONL logs and produce a markdown retro: token economy (main-loop vs delegated workflows), workflow taxonomy, tool distribution, interaction shape, and concrete recommendations. Use after a long or autonomous run to evaluate performance and collaboration. Reads only local ~/.claude and ~/.codex logs; writes to ~/post-session-findings; sends nothing externally.
